description: Legal document. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100–1138 CE). Probably a deed of sale for one half of a house (no prices preserved). Describing the borders and neighbors of a property. Yehoshuaʿ ha-Sar b. [...] ha-Ḥasid is named. Also Abū Najāḥ al-Naṣrānī (the Christian; might be identical with the famous Abū Najāḥ Ibn Qannāʾ).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
